hooks.description: Soft cleanup checklist after gh pr merge / git merge: worktree removal, ops packet lifecycle (delete-by-default), context compact, agent-replay pruning
Block edits to architecture/** without ARCH_PLAN_EVIDENCE env (round2_verdict.md §4.1 #5)
Gate 1: refuse writes to blocking-class capability paths without ARCH_PLAN_EVIDENCE (ULTIMATE_DESIGN §5 Gate 1; sunset 2026-08-04)
Run invariant pytest baseline before any `git commit` and block on regressions vs LIVE baseline 656/46/0 (round2_verdict.md §4.1 #5)

Run gitleaks against staged content before any `git commit`; honors .gitleaks.toml allowlist + SECURITY-FALSE-POSITIVES.md (ultrareview25_remediation 2026-05-01 P0-2 — parity with operator-direct git pre-commit hook; gracefully skips if gitleaks not on PATH)
Advise conflict-first handling for git merge/pull/cherry-pick/rebase/am on protected branches; validate MERGE_AUDIT_EVIDENCE only for escalated broad/high-risk conflict surfaces
Block git add -A/--all/. in main worktree (co-tenant absorption risk). Linked worktrees have isolated indexes and are always allowed. Bypass: COTENANT_GUARD_BYPASS=1
